title: rubus geoides
intro: Rubus geoides, also known as the Australian native raspberry or mountain raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The leaves and fruits of Rubus geoides are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections. Herbal preparations of Rubus geoides can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its health benefits and support overall well-being.
